description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical ceramic bottle with a wide, rounded shoulder and a slightly tapered base. The bottle features a thick, rolled rim at the top, with an opening that appears partially broken or chipped. Its surface is predominantly a matte, off-white or beige color, with visible weathering and subtle discoloration, suggesting age or outdoor exposure. One side of the bottle displays a large, ornate black graphic or label, possibly indicating branding or historical use, with intricate text and imagery. The rest of the bottle is plain, with no additional ornamentation or handles. The overall form and material suggest it could have been used for storage or as a decorative urban artifact.
description: A tall, weathered ceramic bottle with a thick rim, off-white surface, and a large black graphic on one side.
description_view_0: Plain off-white ceramic bottle with a thick rim and no visible graphics or text.
description_view_1: Front view showing a large, ornate black graphic or label on the bottle's surface.
description_view_2: Side view with partial visibility of the black graphic, showing the bottle's curvature and rim.
description_view_3: Rear view of the bottle, plain and unadorned, highlighting the smooth, weathered surface.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large, ornate black graphic with text and imagery on one side of the bottle; style is vintage and detailed.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Visible chipping or breakage around the rim; surface shows weathering and discoloration.
